steps.title: Make two points for the line
steps.content: The line passes through $(0,12)$. Its slope is $\frac{1}{8}$, so moving $8$ units right raises $y$ by $1$. That gives a second point, $(8,13)$.

steps.title: Use the points directly
steps.content: Use the table points directly. From $(0,12)$ to $(8,13)$, the slope is $m=\frac{13-12}{8-0}=\frac{1}{8}.$ Substituting a point into $y=mx+b$ gives $b=12$. That matches Choice D — $y=\frac{1}{8}x+12$.
